title: M17 8DD, United Utilities Water Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/HP3931LJ/V013
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: United Utilities Water Limited Installation name: Davyhulme Wastewater Treatment Works Sludge Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/HP3931LJ/V013  "
